_scenario: UK domestic en-suite bathroom 2700×2100mm with bath+over-bath shower against the south wall. Exercises lighting-layout v1.6.0 Wave-1 cascade — both photometric_grid (INV-11) AND special_locations_zoning (INV-12) are required because room_type=bathroom is in the Part-7 set and mode=full_drawing. Producer-side cascade: special-locations/examples/cascade-lighting-layout-uk-bathroom emits the 5-zone payload + the 30 mA RCD blanket constraint per BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §701.411.3.3. Consumer-side INV-12 walks the 2 ceiling luminaires against payload.zones[] (point-in-polygon + height inclusion), verifies IP and voltage envelopes, and cascades the (empty) flag list.

photometric_ies_paths._source: Synthetic 95mm IPx4 LED recessed downlight, 1500 lm, 3000K, CRI 90, narrow-medium distribution per CIBSE LG7 §6.4. verification_status: synthetic_reference_C3. Cascade reference for the lighting-layout consumer INV-11 walk; engineer-of-record substitutes manufacturer IES (e.g. Aurora, JCC, Collingwood IPx4 series) before final design freeze.
